relatedness_reasoning: While both files involve Accounts and Investments departments, the inbound file reports available cash balances (informational, read-only) and the outbound file contains debit/credit transaction instructions (actionable, transactional). The outbound file contains fund-specific transaction details, approval workflows, and IBAN formats that have no corresponding source in the inbound schema. The currency enum differs (USD inbound vs GBP outbound), and the outbound file's structure and purpose are fundamentally different from the inbound file's reporting nature.
